data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Simplified interfaces cater to user decision-making and minimize the time required to choose from streaming options.
data.technical_spec: Navigation design with intuitive category groupings.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Focus on the ease of interaction with onscreen elements, such as buttons and screen navigation.
data.technical_spec: Larger clickable areas for primary actions.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Leverages user familiarity with common navigation patterns observed on other streaming platforms.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Uses limited information presentation to enhance memory retention and reduce cognitive load.
data.technical_spec: Grid layouts and limited color palettes for content sections.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Balancing aesthetic elements with high usability standards to encourage user satisfaction.
